tasks.label: build-backend
args: cd backend\backend && set JAVA_HOME=C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.10.7-hotspot && .\mvnw.cmd clean install -DskipTests

tasks.label: Build & Start Backend
tasks.command: cd rumi_backend_v2 && cmd /c mvnw.cmd clean install -DskipTests -q && echo Backend built successfully && Start-Sleep -Seconds 2 && java -jar target/rumi_backend_v2-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar
